# `with`, `match`, and `else` Blocks {#sec-with-match-else}

::: {.callout-note}
## Core idea
Three often-underused Python blocks: `with` (context managers), `match` (structural pattern matching), and `else` after `for`/`while`/`try` (the "no exception" / "no break" block).
:::

## In progress {.unnumbered}

This chapter is a stub.
